pi_items.source: setup_task.sh generates the file at this path and task description instructs the agent to open it.
task description asks the agent to save output here, and verifier.py checks this file for the expected output.
setup_task.sh generates the ground truth values at this path and verifier.py uses it to validate the agent's work.

privileged_info_summary: The input data is the synthetic AI4I 2020 Predictive Maintenance Dataset containing 10,000 records, downloaded directly from the UCI Machine Learning Repository and converted into an Excel file at /home/ga/Documents/production_data.xlsx. The agent is expected to perform specific statistical operations using Excel formulas on this data and output the results to /home/ga/Documents/production_analysis.xlsx. The verification relies on checking the presence of required formulas and matching the values against a ground truth file located at /var/lib/app/ground_truth.json, generated independently during setup.
